notes: AI opponent overhaul + more card fixes. The bot no longer swings into a wall (it only attacks when the hit actually connects), spreads DON!! across attackers for efficient hits instead of dumping it all on the Leader, and only counters when it can fully stop the attack (no more wasted partial counters). Card fixes: Crocodile & Mihawk's draw-2/trash-1/then-play now resolves in order (it no longer plays the card you meant to trash); Sabo/Ace/Luffy's 'reveal top of Life, play if it matches' only grants the +2000 when a card is actually played; many more effect conditions (DON!!x2 thresholds, power/cost checks, attribute-icon effects, K.O. and removal-replacement effects) now resolve correctly, and multi-step effects show one action at a time. The Blocker shield now renders on active Blockers.
